name: table
title: Table
description: Data table with CSS grid layout, sorting, pagination, loading skeleton, row selection, and custom cell rendering.

pageIndex.description: Page index (0-based). Enables built-in pagination when set alongside pageSize.

selectedRows.description: Comma-separated zero-based row indices that are selected.

consumption.complexPropertyNote: Assign these non-primitive values as JavaScript properties: columns, data, sortState.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
